title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — EMEA — Q2 2026
summary: EMEA deploys the world's most comprehensive crypto regulatory infrastructure this quarter as 21 EU events converge with 6 UK framework developments and accelerating Middle East licensing rollouts. MiCA's review consultation (deadline Aug 31) shapes the next generation of DeFi and NFT treatment while AMLA becomes operational with direct CASP supervision authority in Q3.
